ab: kipasemalavu tjanusun.
ti Tjanubak a lja Tjaluigi aken, tapuluq anga ku cavilj tucu.
en: My name is Tjanubak Tjaluigi, and I’m 10 years old.

ab: tima su ngadan?
ti Tjanubak a lja Tjaluigi a ken.
aljak sun nua nema zukuan?
en: What ethnic group are you from?

ab: aljak aken nua paiwan zuku.
a kacalisian a mareka su sikatacemekeljan?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: ui, paiwan zuku amen a tacekeljan.
ch: B:是的，我們全家都是排灣族人。
en: Yes, my whole family is Paiwan.

ab: a kacalisian a mareka su sikatacemekeljan?
ch: A:你的家人都是原住民嗎?
en: Are all your family members indigenous?

ab: ini, paiwan zuku a ku kama, pairang a ku kina.
ch: B:不是，我的爸爸是排灣族，我的媽媽是漢人。
en: No, my father is Paiwan, and my mother is Han Taiwanese.

ab: nima sun a aljak?
aljak aken ni Camak a lja Tjaluigi.
ch: B:我是Camak a lja Tjaluig的小孩。
en: I am Camak a lja Tjaluig’s child.

ab: a su kama azua? pida anga cavilj nimadju?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: unem a puluq anga cavilj nimadju.
a su kama azua? pida anga cavilj nimadju?
ch: A:那位是你爸爸嗎? 他幾歲了?
en: Is that your father? How old is he?

ab: ini, nia ramaljemaljeng timadju i qinaljan, alu a puluq anga cavilj nimadju.
ch: B:不是，他是我們部落的耆老，他80歲了。
en: No, he is an elder of our tribe. He is 80 years old.

ab: pida anga cavilj nua su kaka a tjavulung tjanusun a uqaljay?
tapuluq saka alu anga cavilj nua ku kaka a tjavulung tjanuaken a uqaljay.
a liav a cavilj a sikatjavulung tjanusun nua su kaka a uqaljay a tjavulung tjanusun?
ch: A:你哥哥年紀比你大很多嗎?
en: Is your brother much older than you?

ab: lima cavilj a nia didaq.
maudauda a su kinaqaca?
taiday saka sepatj a puluq a ku kinaqaca.
aiyanga sun, nameqacanga sun ui?
ch: A:好久不見，你是不是長高了?
en: I haven’t seen you in a while. Have you grown taller?

ab: ui, taiday saka tjelu a puluq anga ku kinaqaca.
namekudral anga sun ui?
ini, pacevak a su sipacunan.
namekuljay anga sun ui?
ini, namekudral anga ken.
namekudral anga sun ui?
ui, tjelu a puluq anga ku kinasadjelung tucu.
